headline: Pyxus Announces New Chief Human Resources Officer
summary: Pyxus International, Inc. (OTCID: PYYX), a global value-added agricultural Company, today announced the appointment of Joshua Erdei as senior vice president and chief human resources officer.

headline: LG Energy Reports 207.8 Billion Won Loss, Misses Estimates As EV Demand Weakens
summary: Preliminary Q1 results show wider-than-expected loss as EV slowdown offsets energy storage demand growth.

raw.headline: LG Energy Reports 207.8 Billion Won Loss, Misses Estimates As EV Demand Weakens

headline: Chrysler CEO says there is a minivan 'resurgence' but stays quiet on product plans
summary: The Chrysler Pacifica — the brand's last standing model — is expected to grow in sales, according to Chrysler and Dodge CEO Matt McAlear.

raw.headline: Chrysler CEO says there is a minivan 'resurgence' but stays quiet on product plans
raw.summary: The Chrysler Pacifica — the brand's last standing model — is expected to grow in sales, according to Chrysler and Dodge CEO Matt McAlear.

headline: GM forced to make tough decisions as EV market collapses
summary: For the second time in three months, General Motors cut more than 1,000 jobs at Factory Zero, its all-EV assembly plant in Detroit-Hamtramck, Michigan, at least temporarily, as it "rightsizes" its electric vehicle production amid shifting consumer tastes. The company has initiated multiple layoffs, ...
